requirements_met: Unit/integration test separation with proper markers
validation_results.test_command: Independent verification skipped for testing tasks
validation_results.test_output_summary: 20 tests passed: 10 unit tests (mock-based, no infrastructure) + 10 integration tests (@pytest.mark.integration with ephemeral_pg)
validation_results.code_quality: Excellent: comprehensive test coverage across unit and integration layers, proper mocking strategies, parametrized tests for count scenarios, all supersession edge cases addressed

criteria_verification.notes: test_supersede_and_link_marks_predecessor and test_superseded_record_excluded_but_addressable implemented in both unit and integration suites. Evidence bundle confirms verification.
test_supersession_count_outline parametrized with count=[0, 1, 5] in both suites. 6 parameterized tests passed (3 unit + 3 integration). Evidence bundle confirms verification.
Forward-supersession tests verify ASSUM-008: successor can declare supersession of non-existent key, predecessor marked superseded when later written. Evidence bundle confirms verification.
Cross-project supersession tests verify successor in one project can retire predecessor from another namespace. Evidence bundle confirms verification.
Idempotent re-declaration tests verify predecessor superseded exactly once, no duplicate records. Evidence bundle confirms verification.
Chain-collapse tests verify A←B←C where only C unsuperseded but full chain traceable. Evidence bundle confirms verification.
Racing-successors tests verify exactly one successor recorded (last write wins) when two successors race. Evidence bundle confirms verification.
Unit tests use AsyncMock (no infrastructure). Integration tests decorated @pytest.mark.integration with ephemeral_pg fixture. All 20 tests passed. Evidence bundle confirms verification.

rationale: All 8 acceptance criteria independently verified by orchestrator. 20 tests passed (10 unit + 10 integration) with proper infrastructure separation. Honesty verification clean (1.0 score, zero discrepancies). All quality gates passed. No blocking issues. Advisory warning about missing Phase-3 specialist is non-blocking. The Player has delivered a comprehensive, well-architected supersession test suite covering all required scenarios including edge cases (forward supersession, cross-project, chain collapse, racing successors, variable counts).
